description: Contributing to open-source projects for the University of Porto: Uni mobile app (Flutter), NIAEFEUP website (SvelteKit/TailwindCSS), and TTS platform optimization.
Contributing to open-source projects for the University of Porto: Uni mobile app (Flutter), NIAEFEUP website (SvelteKit/TailwindCSS), and TTS platform optimization.
Actively contribute to animal care, welfare and related activities and assist in events, raising awareness.

During my internship at Robotair, I played a central role in the UI/UX redesign of the company's web application, modernizing major sections such as Robots, Pipelines, and Secrets. This work significantly improved usability, consistency, and responsiveness across the platform. In parallel, I also implemented new features, including the Rigel testing system, optional ROS deployments, and a configurable interface for unit testing, as well as fixing critical bugs. This experience strengthened my skills in React, interface design, and agile development, while contributing to a production-level product used by real clients.
